buildCommand: cd dapp && npm install && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://vercel.live; connect-src 'self' https://*.aptoslabs.com https://fullnode.devnet.aptoslabs.com https://fullnode.mainnet.aptoslabs.com wss://*.aptoslabs.com https://api.mainnet.aptoslabs.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; style-src-elem 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://r2cdn.perplexity.ai data:; img-src 'self' data: https:; manifest-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
